info.title: Hamster Platform API
info.description:
Unified API documentation for the Hamster platform, combining all microservices:

- **Auth** (`/api/auth/v1`) — Authentication & authorization (OTP, social login, token management)
- **Common** (`/api/common/v1`) — Shared resources: categories, currencies, VAT, settings, dashboard
- **Customer** (`/api/cs/v1`) — Customer records, wallets, profiles, referrals
- **Retailer** (`/api/rs/v1`) — Retailers, stores, POS terminals, brands, products, discounts
- **Search** (`/api/search/v1`) — Full-text search across platform entities (Elasticsearch)
- **User** (`/api/user/v1`) — User profiles, retailer team members, notifications, themes
- **Posts** (`/api/ps/v1`) — Posts management

All paths are prefixed with their service base path. Bearer JWT authentication is required for most endpoints; see individual endpoint descriptions for specifics.

servers.description: Local development (append service port + base path)

get.description: Public health check. No version prefix. Full path: /auth/health.

post.description: Initiates passwordless signup. Cognito sends an OTP to the email. Returns a session token for OTP verification.
Initiates passwordless login. Cognito sends an OTP to the email.
Verifies the OTP code and returns JWT tokens on success.
Resends OTP code to the email. Returns a new session token.
Exchange a refresh token for new access and ID tokens. For retailer tokens, include cognitoUsername.
Validates a JWT token and returns its payload.
Revokes the refresh token and signs out the user.

delete.description: Deletes the customer's Cognito account and triggers downstream cleanup.

get.description: Returns available social login providers with redirect URLs.
Exchanges a Google authorization code for Hamster JWT tokens.
Exchanges an Apple authorization code for Hamster JWT tokens.

post.description: Password-based login for retailer users.
Register a new retailer user with password and optional role.

400.description: Invalid input or password too weak

post.description: Creates a new Cognito user for a retailer (used internally when adding team members).
Sends a password reset code to the retailer's email.
Resets the password using the verification code.
Changes the retailer user's password. Requires a valid Bearer token.

get.description: Returns the translation JSON for the given locale.

put.description: Updates the translation file for the given locale. Requires API key.

post.description: Authenticates a service client using client credentials and returns an access token with HMAC code.

get.description: Public health check. No authentication. Full path: /common/health.
Checks which category IDs are valid.

post.description: Admin only (retailer-admin, wheel-admin).

get.description: Public health check. No version prefix. Full path: /search/health.
Full-text search on retailer name and domain. Only active, non-deleted retailers are returned.

parameters.name: retailer
parameters.description: Free-text search term matching retailer name and domain.

get.description: Full-text search on store name and address. When user_email is provided, each result includes an `isFavourite` boolean.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search term matching store name and address.

parameters.name: user_email
parameters.description: When provided, each result includes isFavourite boolean.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter stores by product category UUID.

get.description: Full-text search on product name and description. Only published products (with associated post) are returned.
Full-text search on discount name and description. Only published discounts (is_published=true) are returned.
Returns whether a discount has an associated post.
Full-text search on post title and description. When user_email is provided, filters to favourite stores and includes disable_discount flag.

parameters.name: user_email
parameters.description: Filters posts to favourite stores and includes disable_discount flag.

get.summary: Get Shareable Post with OG Tags
get.description: Returns HTML page with Open Graph meta tags for social media sharing.
Full-text search on coupon title, description and code. Only active, non-expired coupons are returned.

parameters.name: coupon
parameters.description: Free-text search term matching title, description, code.

get.description: Full-text search on distributor name.
Returns all coupons in a customer's wallet.

get.summary: Get Customer Active Coupons at POS
get.description: Returns active coupons for a customer at a specific POS terminal, including applicable discounts and product barcodes.

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: Store UUID or external store ID.

parameters.name: retailerId
parameters.description: Filter by Retailer UUID or external ID.

post.description: Fetches all posts from api-posts-service via RPC and indexes them in Elasticsearch. Idempotent.
Sets created_date to yesterday for all store documents missing the field. Idempotent.
Sets created_date to yesterday for all retailer documents missing the field. Idempotent.
Sets created_date to yesterday for all discount documents missing the field. Idempotent.
Sets created_date to yesterday for all post documents missing the field. Idempotent.

get.description: Public health check. Full path: /user/health.
At least one of userId, email, or cognitoId is required.

put.description: Updates user profile. Supports file upload for profile picture via multipart/form-data.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's info derived from the JWT token. All roles.
At least one of userId or cognitoId is required.
Admin only (retailer-admin, wheel-admin).

post.description: Admin only.

get.description: At least one of userId, hamId, or email is required. Customer or Wheel Admin.
Public. Renders an HTML redirect page with deep linking.
Public. Returns user count within a date range.
Public health check. No authentication and no version prefix. Full path: /ps/health.

post.description: Create a new retailer post. Sent as multipart/form-data so an image or video file can be uploaded with the metadata. stores and product_categories are JSON-encoded strings. For a DISCOUNT post (post_type=2), discount_id is required. The 201 confirms creation and returns the new post id.

400.description: Invalid request data — validation or business-rule error

get.description: Paginated list of posts for a retailer. retailer_id is required; skip / limit drive pagination and post_title / is_deleted filter the result set.

parameters.name: retailer_id
parameters.description: Retailer UUID whose posts are returned.

400.description: Missing retailer_id or invalid query parameter

404.description: No posts found for the retailer

delete.description: Soft-delete a post identified by the postId query parameter.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: UUID of the post to delete.

get.description: Retrieve a single post, including target group, stores, product categories, media and (for discount posts) discount detail.

put.description: Update an existing post. Sent as multipart/form-data so a replacement image or video can be uploaded. All fields are optional; only supplied fields are changed. Returns the full updated post.

Auth_ChallengeResponseDto.description: Cognito challenge response returned on login/signup.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.
Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

newPassword.description: Must differ from current. Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char.

clientSecretHash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the client secret.

Common_UpdateCategoryDto.description: Partial of CreateCategoryDto. At least one field required.

Retailer_CreateCompanyDto.description: JSON company creation. Supports transactionStatus: NEW, MODIFY, DELETE.

Retailer_RetailerSyncBaseDto.description: Full retailer sync payload including retailer, store, and distributor data.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

Posts_CreatePostDto.description: Multipart payload to create a retailer post. stores and product_categories are JSON-encoded strings.

stores.description: JSON-encoded array of stores [{ store_id, store_name, store_location }].

product_categories.description: JSON-encoded array of product categories [{ product_category_id, product_category_name }].

is_schedule_ahead.description: Schedule the post for future publishing.

discount_id.description: Discount ID (required when post_type is DISCOUNT).

Posts_UpdatePostDto.description: Multipart payload to update a post. All fields optional; only supplied fields are changed.

is_schedule_ahead.description: Schedule the post for future publishing.

Posts_CreatePostResponseDto.description: Returned when a post is created.

Posts_UpdatePostResponseDto.description: Returned when a post is updated. Includes the full updated post.

data.description: Complete updated post data with all fields.

Posts_DeletePostResponseDto.description: Returned when a post is deleted.

Posts_PostDiscountDto.description: Discount detail attached to a discount post.

Posts_GetPostListResponseDto.description: A post record with target group, stores, categories, media and optional discount.

moneySpendsInShop.description: Target group: money spends in shop.

totalCount.description: Total number of posts matching the filter.
